assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 6-12 show JQL query: 'project = TC AND labels = "CVE-2026-31812" AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003' — searches by CVE label and explicitly excludes the current issue key TC-8003.

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 33-39: 'TC-7999 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] --> stream 2.2.x' and 'TC-8003 stream suffix (current issue): [rhtpa-2.2] --> stream 2.2.x', 'Classification: Same-stream sibling'. Line 39: 'This is a duplicate, not a companion tracker.' Sibling Classification Summary table on line 45 confirms 'Same-stream duplicate'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Decision: Close as Duplicate of TC-7999'. Lines 34-35: 'Resolution: Duplicate' and 'Linked to: TC-7999 (the original issue being retained)'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 26-30: Proposed comment reads 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. TC-7999 is already In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap -- both issues cover the 2.2.x stream for the same vulnerable dependency (quinn-proto < 0.11.14). Closing this issue as Duplicate.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 62-74: 'Duplicate Detection Short-Circuit' section explicitly lists all skipped steps including 'Step 8 (Remediation task creation) -- skipped' and states 'No remediation tasks are created for TC-8003.' triage-outcome.md lines 47-54 under 'Actions NOT Taken' confirms: 'No remediation tasks created', 'No upstream backport task', 'No downstream propagation subtask'.
